case_title: EDUARDO CHE MUTUL VS. YING QIN YUAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUTUL, EDUARDO CHE AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, YING QIN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
